themes.name: 3. 黑客终端代码 (Terminal CLI)
themes.css: body.theme3{background:#000;color:#0f0;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;} .theme3 .global-stats{background:#000;border:1px solid #0f0;border-radius:0;flex-direction:column;} .theme3 .stats-row{border-color:#0a0 !important;} .theme3 .grid-container{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:0;} .theme3 .vps-card{flex-direction:column;background:transparent;border:none;border-bottom:1px dashed #0a0;border-radius:0;box-shadow:none;padding:15px 0;} .theme3 .card-left{border:none;flex-direction:row;align-items:center;padding:0;margin:0;gap:10px;} .theme3 .card-title{color:#0f0;font-size:14px;} .theme3 .card-title::before{content:'> root@vps:~# ';color:#fff;} .theme3 .card-badges, .theme3 .ping-box, .theme3 .stat-bar-full{display:none;} .theme3 .card-right{flex-direction:row;flex-wrap:wrap;border:none;padding:10px 0 0 20px;gap:20px;} .theme3 .stat-group{flex:none;flex-direction:row;align-items:center;gap:5px;margin:0;} .theme3 .stat-header{font-size:12px;color:#0a0;} .theme3 .stat-header span:first-child::after{content:':';} .theme3 .stat-subtext{display:none;} .theme3 .g-val, .theme3 .card-meta{color:#0f0;} .theme3 .status-dot{border-radius:0;width:10px;height:10px;background:#0f0 !important;} .theme3 .filter-tag, .theme3 .view-controls{background:#000;border:1px solid #0f0;color:#0f0;border-radius:0;} .theme3 .toggle-btn.active, .theme3 .filter-tag.active{background:#0f0;color:#000;} .theme3 .toggle-btn{color:#0a0;}

themes.name: 5. 时光轴树状图 (Vertical Timeline)
themes.css: body.theme5{background:#fff;color:#333;} .theme5 .global-stats{border:1px solid #eee;box-shadow:none;} .theme5 .grid-container{display:flex;flex-direction:column;border-left:3px solid #e2e8f0;margin-left:20px;padding-left:30px;gap:0;} .theme5 .vps-card{flex-direction:row;border:none;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;border-radius:0;box-shadow:none;padding:25px 0;position:relative;} .theme5 .vps-card:hover{transform:translateX(5px);background:#fafafa;} .theme5 .vps-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:-39px;top:30px;width:15px;height:15px;background:#3b82f6;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px #e2e8f0;} .theme5 .card-left{flex:0 0 200px;border-right:1px dashed #cbd5e1;padding-right:20px;margin-right:20px;border-bottom:none;} .theme5 .card-right{flex-direction:row;flex-wrap:wrap;border:none;padding:0;align-items:center;gap:15px;} .theme5 .stat-group{flex:1 1 120px;background:#f8fafc;padding:10px 15px;border-radius:8px;margin:0;} .theme5 .ping-box{display:none;} .theme5 .group-header{margin-left:20px;}

themes.name: 6. 樱花二次元悬浮气泡 (Anime Floating)
themes.css: body.theme6{background:url('https://img.api.awsl.cot.me/app/acg') center/cover fixed;font-family:'Comic Sans MS',cursive;} .theme6::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);z-index:-1;} .theme6 .global-stats{border-radius:40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);} .theme6 .grid-container{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:30px;} .theme6 .vps-card{width:320px;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border:2px solid rgba(255,182,193,0.5);border-radius:40px;padding:30px;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(255,182,193,0.2);} .theme6 .vps-card:hover{transform:translateY(-10px);border-color:#ff69b4;} .theme6 .card-left{width:100%;border-bottom:2px dashed rgba(255,182,193,0.5);border-right:none;padding:0 0 15px 0;margin:0 0 15px 0;align-items:center;text-align:center;} .theme6 .card-right{width:100%;border:none;padding:0;} .theme6 .stat-bar-full{background:rgba(255,182,193,0.3);border-radius:10px;} .theme6 .stat-bar-full > div{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ffb6c1,#ff69b4) !important;border-radius:10px;} .theme6 .ping-box{flex-direction:column;align-items:center;background:rgba(255,182,193,0.2);border:none;border-radius:20px;} .theme6 .group-header{text-align:center;border:none;font-size:24px;color:#ff69b4;text-shadow:2px 2px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.8);}

themes.name: 7. 苹果灵动岛倒置布局 (Dynamic Island)
8. 深空雷达田字格 (DeepSpace Radar)
themes.css: body.theme8{background:#030712;color:#e2e8f0;} .theme8 .global-stats{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0f172a,#030712);border:1px solid #38bdf8;border-radius:16px;} .theme8 .stats-row{border-color:rgba(56,189,248,0.2) !important;} .theme8 .grid-container{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(350px,1fr));gap:20px;} .theme8 .vps-card{flex-direction:column;background:rgba(15,23,42,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.3);border-radius:16px;padding:20px;} .theme8 .vps-card:hover{border-color:#38bdf8;box-shadow:inset 0 0 20px rgba(56,189,248,0.1);} .theme8 .card-left{border:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.2);padding-bottom:15px;margin-bottom:15px;flex-direction:row;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;} .theme8 .card-right{border:none;padding:0;display:grid;grid-template-areas:'cpu ram' 'disk net';gap:15px;} .theme8 .stat-group:nth-child(1){grid-area:cpu;} .theme8 .stat-group:nth-child(2){grid-area:ram;} .theme8 .stat-group:nth-child(3){grid-area:disk;} .theme8 .stat-group:nth-child(4){grid-area:net;} .theme8 .stat-group{background:rgba(30,41,59,0.5);padding:10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);margin:0;} .theme8 .stat-bar-full{background:#0f172a;} .theme8 .ping-box{display:none;} .theme8 .card-meta{display:none;} .theme8 .status-dot{box-shadow:0 0 10px currentColor;} .theme8 .group-header{color:#38bdf8;border:none;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;} .theme8 .group-header::before{content:'◈ ';color:#38bdf8;}
